      class MutableSATInteger extends SATInteger implements Serializable

    • Class org.mcp.sat.SATInteger

      class SATInteger extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • _bitvec
          org.logicng.formulas.Variable[] _bitvec
          Bit vector representing the integer (each bit is a SAT variable).
        • _factory
          org.logicng.formulas.FormulaFactory _factory
          Formula factory for creating SAT formulas.
        • _maxVal
          long _maxVal
          Maximum value representable by this SATInteger.
